rows.label: tev065901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev065901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Da Zeulbe about the Growth.

rows.label: tev065901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev065901_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Da Zeulbe if anything
is troubling him.

rows.label: tev065901_SEL1011
rows.name:
Ask Da Zeulbe why the Growth
pursue humans so tenaciously.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Da Zeulbe about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Da Zeulbe about Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Da Zeulbe about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hmph! What about them? That pathetic craven Luxaar
acts as though he matters in the organization, but
he's no better than any other Samaarian lackey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0002
rows.name:
And he's certainly not a leader of
character like our Prince Jiarg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0003
rows.name:
His losses to you—combined with our betrayal—
ought to have the maggot writhing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Were our men in better shape, we would
go and finish him off ourselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0005
rows.name:
And so we shall, once we are
prepared. We will infiltrate his
lair and strike the life from him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0010
rows.name:
The Bias are determined to eradicate
us. Every day brings a new skirmish.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0011
rows.name:
What they lack in wits they more than
make up for in toughness, and we have
been struggling to thin their numbers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0012
rows.name:
But you have fought many of them, have
you not? If you know any ways to
dispatch them swiftly, enlighten me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0017
rows.name:
I should ask you! Did you do something
to incur their never-ending wrath?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0018
rows.name:
They have always done whatever it takes
to obtain the things Samaar desires.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0019
rows.name:
But they were just lapdogs,
and never showed any particular
investment in the work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0020
rows.name:
All that changed when you entered the picture.
Without a single order from Samaar, the Growth
targeted you with every soldier they had.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0021
rows.name:
There is no precedent for this.
Perhaps one of your ancestors
delivered insult to Luxaar's mother![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0026
rows.name:
My brother Naguth and sister Girhi and
I have been passing the hours hunting
and destroying what Growth we can find.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0027
rows.name:
Just the other day, we had a run-in with the
Marnucks gathered in the fortress above and
made off with a great number of weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0028
rows.name:
Heh. I never cared for the Marnucks. They
always acted far above their station![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0032
rows.name:
I have tested my mettle with some mighty
opponents since coming here. There was Ernest,
the Contemplative down in King's Falls...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0033
rows.name:
And I shall never forget my endless clash with
Ludvik, the Picky Eater, deep in the Keegan Ridge!
But none of these creatures were as strong as you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0034
rows.name:
Luxaar chose the wrong human to pick
a fight with. But let him agonize over
that mistake in the next world![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0039
rows.name:
My brother Naguth and sister Girhi and I
have been passing the hours hunting and
destroying what Growth survivors we can find.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0040
rows.name:
Just the other day, we had a run-in with the
Marnucks gathered in the fortress above and
made off with a great number of weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065901_MSG0041
rows.name:
Heh. I never cared for the Marnucks. They
always acted far above their station![ST:wait ]
